arts.ttl: LIVE: English National League side Tamworth host Premier League Tottenham
arts.sum: Tamworth host Premier League giants Tottenham. With almost 100 places separating the two clubs in the English football pyramid, the charm of the FA Cup continues. ESPN has updates.

arts.ttl: Alfie Dorrington and two Tottenham players who could leave after Ange Postecoglou claim
arts.sum: When asked in his pre-match press conference if this weekend's FA Cup tie is an opportunity to see some of the younger players such as Dorrington, Mikey Moore and Will Lankshear, Postecoglou's answer perhaps wasn't the response some wanted when it comes to the centre-back receiving a start . Postecoglou is so short on centre-back options right now and it seems the ideal time to share the minutes between Archie Gray and Radu Dragusin as the Australian will not want to push the duo too much and see the numbers in the treatment room increase in the process.

arts.ttl: Tottenham braced for Antonio Conte transfer raid as Ange Postecoglou undroppable faces huge call
arts.sum: As Conte had Lukaku as his replacement, he was certainly prepared but the same cannot be said for Kvaratskhelia who appears to have handed in a transfer request for January. Antonio Conte could be set to attempt a transfer raid of former club Tottenham for a player he helped bring to the club.

arts.ttl: Moore, Lankshear and Dorrington in Spurs XI Postecoglou must pick vs Tamworth
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur travel to National League side Tamworth in the FA Cup third round on Sunday and Ange Postecoglou must balance the need to rest players with not being on the end of a giant-killing. Gold's team: Kinsky; Spence, Dragusin, Gray, Reguilon; Sarr, Bergvall, Maddison; Moore, Lankshear, Werner.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou names which Tottenham goalkeeper will start against Tamworth
arts.sum: Some on social media immediately went for the worst case scenarios as the 27-year-old was being treated by medics and when asked whether the Uruguayan had hit his head on the turf to cause the concussion, the Tottenham boss took a swipe at those speculating. In Sunday's FA Cup tie against the non-league side on their artificial 3G pitch, Postecoglou could have handed another opportunity to Brandon Austin, who also impressed on his Tottenham debut against Newcastle in the previous game, or veteran goalkeeper Fraser Forster.

arts.ttl: What Richarlison did to Pape Matar Sarr after Lucas Bergvall Tottenham goal vs Liverpool
arts.sum: Tottenham fans haven't had a lot to shout about recently due to the team's poor run of form, but Bergvall's goal was definitely something to treasure in such a difficult period for Ange Postecoglou and the club. "I don't think one win changes anything, but we've been through a pretty tough time and as I said, all along not through the want of trying and I mean I can't commend the players highly enough in terms of their efforts.

arts.ttl: Incredible football stadiums that never were including Chelsea and Spurs designs
arts.sum: In a similar vein to their city rivals, Everton also proposed plans for a new stadium in the mid-to-late noughties: a 50,000-seater jewel located on Kings Dock. However, the rejections ceased in 2020 when Liverpool City Council approved Everton's Bramley-Moore Dock plan.

arts.ttl: How to watch Tamworth vs Tottenham - TV channel, ITVX live stream details and kick-off time - football.london
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur continue with cup football this weekend, switching their attention to the FA Cup this time around with a third round tie against National League opponents Tamworth. Tottenham's away game against Tamworth in the FA Cup third round will take place on Sunday, January 12 and it will kick-off from 12.30pm.

arts.ttl: Richarlison boost, absent players and Kinsky bond spotted in Tottenham training
arts.sum: In Tottenham's latest training footage, the new signing was warming up on an exercise bike in the gym alongside players such as Alfie Dorrington, Will Lankshear and Callum Olusesi. What was clear to see in Tottenham's latest training session was that the players who had played the vast majority of the Liverpool contest were not involved on the grass at Hotspur Way. Likely to have had a recovery session following their exertions against the Reds, those taking part in training outside were the ones who either didn't feature or played limited minutes.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou admits he has made major Timo Werner transfer window decision
arts.sum: The Tottenham boss took off the winger at half-time and said after the game last month that the Champions League winner's performance had not been acceptable, particularly as an older head among many younger players. I felt that day, particularly with the situation we were in and him being a senior player, I thought he could have contributed more, but since then he’s made an impact as we’ve wanted to.
